section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. V EHICLE SIDESLIP ANGLE ESTIMATION
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: III. T RAJECTORY TRACKING CONTROL OF AVS

section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: V. CONCLUSION AND FUTURE WORKS
section_map.zh: 总结贡献和未来方向，也常暴露作者承认的边界条件。
section_map.en: Summarizes contributions and often reveals author-recognized boundaries.

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“CAV control survey”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of CAV control survey. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Broad CAV control overview; not intersection-smoothing specific.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: CAV 控制从状态估计、轨迹跟踪到协同控制有哪些主线方法，它们如何支撑交叉口协同研究？
overview.core_question_en: What are the main CAV control families from state estimation to trajectory tracking and cooperative control, and how do they frame intersection research?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Systematic survey from vehicle state estimation and trajectory tracking to collaborative CAV control applications.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Reviews vehicle-control approaches relevant to safety and collaborative control.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Frames comfort, energy saving, and transportation efficiency as central CAV control goals.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：综述价值强但原创方法弱：适合作为背景和分类框架引用，不应当作为核心算法依据。

methodology.model_name: 通用车辆控制闭环 / Generic vehicle-control loop
symbols: 轨迹规划/调度层给定目标
methodology.algorithm_zh: 作为综述，它按估计、跟踪、路径规划、协同控制等层次整理方法。对本项目最有价值的是把 comfort、safety、energy、efficiency 放入同一个 CAV 控制目标谱系。
methodology.algorithm_en: As a survey, it organizes estimation, tracking, planning, and cooperative-control techniques, framing safety, comfort, energy, and efficiency as connected CAV objectives.
methodology.stability_zh: 综述不提供单个算法的收敛证明，但能帮助你定位不同方法的理论依据，如鲁棒控制、MPC、学习控制和协同控制。
methodology.stability_en: It does not certify one algorithm, but it maps the theoretical families used to justify robust control, MPC, learning control, and cooperative control.
assumptions: 文献覆盖广但不可避免存在选择偏差。
不同控制任务和应用场景的指标不可直接比较。
综述结论需要回到具体论文验证。

experiments.validation: Literature survey rather than original experiments.
experiments.baselines: 不适用原始实验；基准是分类完整性、代表性文献覆盖和趋势判断。
experiments.metrics: 综述质量、分类清晰度、引用覆盖、应用关联度和未来方向启发。
experiments.ablation: 综述没有消融；阅读时应做你自己的 taxonomy cross-check：是否遗漏 intersection scheduling、formal safety、mixed traffic。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
关注约束激活位置、速度/加速度曲线和安全裕度是否平滑。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 范围太广，交叉口轨迹平滑不是焦点。
综述时效性随新 RL/CBF/GNN 文献快速下降。
缺少统一实验平台比较。
extensions: 把综述分类裁剪成你的 thesis taxonomy：scheduler、smoother、safety filter、evaluation。
建立一张 CAV 控制方法与 JSSP/RL/AIM 的映射表。
用它支持引言中 safety-comfort-energy-efficiency 多目标论证。
critique.project_use: Useful context citation for why trajectory tracking, collaborative control, safety, comfort, and energy belong together.

interactive.response_zh: 成熟度越高可验证性越强，但探索性和性能上限可能较低。
interactive.response_en: Higher maturity improves certifiability but may reduce exploratory performance.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
